title: DMOW-055 Piss Girl Tsumugi Serizawa - Serizawa Tsumugi
overview: What if a beautiful girl who doesn't know dirt remembers the joy of teasing a M man...? "All the men of adults... they all like pee, right? What began to sprout in Tsumugi, who was full of curiosity, was the pleasure obtained by making a perverted old man drink urine! "If my uncle is happy ... Tsumugi will give you a lot of pee! ] While looking down at the adults who are excited to be pissed, the innocent queen's holy water training continues! [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
